---
title: 'Tired of fighting...'
date: '2016-10-18T23:56:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8468552188374968281'
blogger_filename: '/2016/10/tired-of-fighting.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Renewing the Mind (Stinking Thinking)'
  - 'Resting'
  - 'Recovery'
  - 'In The Mire'
  - 'Emotions'
---

I reached the snapping point. I'm not well... <br /><br />I didn't reach it all at once; rather, it was like a slow noose creeping around my neck with no way to escape. <br /><br />Last week I was diagnosed with high blood pressure (like, WOAH we might need to get you to the ER high blood pressure). Combined with several other stresses and mental fractures, I decided I need help... more help than a blog-diary can give me. <br /><br />So I reached out to two good resources, and I set an appointment with a counselor. I think more tough decisions are coming, but this is a good start. It's time to get a hold of this Ennui. <br /><br />For now... I'm going to do some writing and listen to <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IcbOu8ff_8I" target="_blank">BB King Blues Greatest Hits [Full Album 2015] - BB King Blues Best Songs 2015.&nbsp;</a> <br /><br />&nbsp;D<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />
